untranslatable_reason: Signal requires rolling OLS regression with dynamic hedge ratios between paired assets and z-score computation on residuals. These advanced statistical transformations (OLS regression, residual z-scores, hedge ratio calculation, and stationarity testing) are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires pair trading mechanics (two correlated assets) which cannot be expressed with single-asset indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using returns as a stand-in for mean-reverted spread z-scores, but this is fundamentally inadequate. The signal's core logic depends on: (1) computing regression between two paired assets, (2) extracting residuals, (3) normalizing residuals into z-scores, and (4) maintaining statistical significance checks on hedge ratios. None of these operations can be replicated from the allowed indicator list. This signal requires custom indicator development or a multi-asset framework.
